scripts.start: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=admin-dashboard" "npm run dev --workspace=razorpay-backend" "cd customer-app && npm start"
scripts.prod: concurrently "npm run start --workspace=admin-dashboard" "npm run start --workspace=razorpay-backend" "cd customer-app && npm start"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspaces && cd customer-app && npm run build:web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspaces && cd customer-app && npm run lint
